error-import-empty-board: Lokhu okukhishiwe akuqukethe okuqukethwe kwebhodi (akukho ama-swimlane, izinhlu noma amakhadi). Kungenzeka kwenziwe uhlobo lwe-WeKan oludala olunephutha elaziwayo lokukhipha. Sicela uphinde ukhiphe ibhodi ngenguqulo yamanje bese ungenisa ifayela elisha.
error-linked-card-not-allowed: Ungaxhuma kuphela kwikhadi elijwayelekile. Ukuxhuma kwelinye ikhadi elixhunyiwe, noma kwikhadi elixhuma libuyele kuleli bhodi, akuvunyelwe ngoba kungenza amakhadi angafinyeleleki.
export-card-field-dates: Amadethi (Okudaliwe, Okwamukelwe, Okuqala, Okufanele, Okuphela Ngayo)
export-card-excel-no-disk-space: Ayikwazi ukuthekelisa ku-Excel: asikho isikhala esanele sediski samahhala
filter-on-desc: Uhlunga amakhadi kuleli bhodi. Chofoza lapha ukuze uhlele isihlungi.
advanced-filter-description: Isihlungi Esithuthukisiwe sivumela ukubhala iyunithi yezinhlamvu equkethe ama-opharetha alandelayo: == != <= >= && || ( ) Isikhala sisetshenziswa njengesihlukanisi phakathi kwama-Opharetha. Ungakwazi ukuhlunga zonke izinkambu ngokwezifiso ngokuthayipha amagama azo kanye namanani. Isibonelo: Inkundla1 == Inani1. Qaphela: Uma izinkambu noma amanani equkethe izikhala, udinga ukuwahlanganisa zibe izingcaphuno ezizodwa. Isibonelo: 'Inkambu 1' == 'Inani 1'. Ukuze izinhlamvu zokulawula okukodwa (' \/) zeqiwe, ungasebenzisa \. Isibonelo: I-Field1 == I\'m. Futhi ungakwazi ukuhlanganisa izimo eziningi. Isibonelo: F1 == V1 || F1 == V2. Ngokuvamile bonke opharetha bahunyushwa kusukela kwesokunxele kuya kwesokudla. Ungashintsha i-oda ngokubeka amabakaki. Isibonelo: F1 == V1 && ( F2 == V2 || F2 == V3 ). Futhi ungasesha izinkambu zombhalo usebenzisa i-regex: F1 == /Tes.*/i
imported-member-no-account: Ilungu elingenisiwe — alikho iakhawunti evumelanayo okwamanje
import-board-instruction-kanboard: Namathisela i-JSON yokukhishwa kwe-Kanboard: into ene-"columns" (noma imisebenzi ephethe column_name) kanye ne-array "tasks" (title, description, column_name, swimlane_name, date_due, owner, tags). Amakholomu aba izinhlu futhi imisebenzi iba amakhadi.
import-board-instruction-deck: Namathisela i-JSON yebhodi ye-NextCloud Deck (ibhodi ene-"stacks", i-stack ngayinye iphethe "cards" yayo). Ama-stack aba izinhlu futhi amakhadi aba amakhadi.
import-board-instruction-openproject: Namathisela i-JSON yeqoqo le-work-packages le-OpenProject (GET /api/v3/work_packages). Izimo ziba izinhlu futhi ama-work package aba amakhadi.
import-board-instruction-issues: Namathisela i-array ye-JSON yezinkinga ze-__sourceName__ (__endpoint__). Izinkinga ziba amakhadi ahlanganiswe ngezinhlu ze-Open / Closed.
import-board-instruction-asana: Namathisela i-JSON yokukhishwa kwemisebenzi ye-Asana ({ "data": [...] } okuvela ekukhishweni kwe-Asana noma GET /tasks). Imisebenzi ihlanganiswa ngezigaba (izobulungu); imisebenzi ephelele iya ku-Done.
import-board-instruction-zenkit: Namathisela i-JSON yokukhishwa kohlu lwe-ZenKit ({ "title", "stages":[...], "items":[...] }). Izigaba ziba izinhlu futhi izinto ziba amakhadi.
import-board-instruction-trello: Ebhodini lakho le-Trello, hamba ku-'Menu', bese uthi 'Okwengeziwe', 'Printa futhi Khipha', 'Khipha i-JSON', bese ukopisha umbhalo owumphumela.
import-board-instruction-csv: Namathisela Amanani Ahlukaniswe Ngokhefana(CSV)/ Ithebhu Amanani Ahlukaniswe (TSV) .
import-board-instruction-jira: Namathisela i-JSON evela ku-Jira Cloud REST API issue search (GET /rest/api/2/search), noma into elingana nayo { "issues": [...] }. Izimo ze-Jira ziba izinhlu futhi izinkinga ziba amakhadi. Ngokuzikhethela faka i-array "automationRules" ukungenisa imithetho.
import-board-instruction-excel: Khetha isipredishithi se-.xlsx esifana ne-WeKan (amakholomu afanayo nokukhishwa kwe-Excel: Title, Description, Status/List, Members, Labels, izinsuku, izinkambu zezifiso). Umugqa wokuqala uyisihloko.
import-board-instruction-wekan: Ebhodini lakho, hamba 'kumenyu', bese 'Khipha ibhodi', bese ukopisha umbhalo efayeleni elilandiwe.
import-board-instruction-about-errors: Uma uthola amaphutha lapho ungenisa ibhodi, ngezinye izikhathi ukungenisa kusasebenza, futhi ibhodi isekhasini Wonke Amabhodi.
import-json-placeholder: Namathisela idatha yakho evumelekile ye-JSON lapha
import-csv-placeholder: Namathisela idatha yakho evumelekile ye-CSV/TSV lapha
import-attachments-zip: I-ZIP yokunamathiselwe kwe-Trello (ngokuzikhethela, kusuka ku-Trello Card Attachments Downloader)
import-trello-json-file-hint: Ibhodi elilodwa le-Trello elikhishwe njenge-.json. Uma ugcine i-Trello API key ne-token, okunamathiselwe kwayo, isisekelo sebhodi kanye nezithombe zamalungu nakho kuyalandwa.
import-trello-zip-file-hint: I-.zip enefayela elilodwa noma amaningi ebhodi e-.json kanye nokunamathiselwe kwawo kuma-subfolder anegama-lebhodi (kusuka ku-Trello Card Attachments Downloader). Wonke amabhodi ayangeniswa.

globalSearch-instructions-description: Usesho lungabandakanya ama-opharetha ukuze acwenge ukusesha.  Ama-opharetha acaciswa ngokubhala igama lomsebenzisi nenani elihlukaniswe koloni.  Isibonelo, ukucaciswa komsebenzisi kokuthi `list:Blocked` kungakhawulela ukusesha kumakhadi aqukethwe ohlwini oluqanjwe ngokuthi *Ovinjiwe*.  Uma inani liqukethe izikhala noma izinhlamvu ezikhethekile kufanele lifakwe kuzimpawu zokucaphuna (isb. `__operator_list__:"To Review"`).
globalSearch-instructions-operator-due: `__operator_due__:<n>` - ​​amakhadi okumele akhokhe kufike ezinsukwini *<n>* kusukela manje.  `__operator_due__:__predicate_overdue__ ubala wonke amakhadi adlule usuku lwawo lomnqamulajuqu.
globalSearch-instructions-status-all: `__predicate_all__` - ​​wonke amakhadi afakwe kungobo yomlando nangafakwanga kungobo yomlando
globalSearch-instructions-operator-has: `__operator_has__:<field>` - ​​lapho *<field>* ingenye ye-`__predicate_attachment__`, `__predicate_checklist__`, `__predicate_description__`, `__predicate_start__`, `__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_end__`, `__predicate_assignee__` noma `__predicate_member__`.  Ukubeka okuthi `-` ngaphambi kokuthi *<field>* kusesha ukungabikho kwevelu kuleyo nkambu (isb. `has:-due` usesha amakhadi ngaphandle kwedethi yamanqamu).
globalSearch-instructions-operator-sort: `__operator_sort__:<sort-name>` - ​​lapho *<sort-name>* ingenye ye-`__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_created__` noma `__predicate_modified__`.  Ukuze uthole uhlobo olwehlayo, beka `-` ngaphambi kwegama lokuhlunga.
globalSearch-instructions-operator-limit: `__operator_limit__:<n>` - ​​lapho *<n>* iyinani eliphelele elibonisa inombolo yamakhadi azoboniswa ekhasini ngalinye.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-2:
Ama-opharetha afanayo *NOMA* ahlanganiswe ndawonye.  Amakhadi afana nanoma yimiphi imibandela azobuyiswa.
U-`__operator_list__:Available __operator_list__:Blocked` uzobuyisela amakhadi aqukethwe kunoma yiluphi uhlu oluqanjwe ngokuthi *Ovinjiwe* noma *Okutholakalayo*.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3: Ama-opharetha ahlukene *FUTHI* ahlanganiswe ndawonye.  Amakhadi afana nawo wonke ama-opharetha ahlukene abuyiselwayo.  U-`__operator_list__:Available __operator_label__:red` ubuyisela amakhadi kuphela ohlwini *Okutholakalayo* anelebula *elibomvu*.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3-2: Izinsuku zingacaciswa njengenombolo ephozithivu noma enegethivu noma kusetshenziswa okuthi `__predicate_week__`, `__predicate_month__`, `__predicate_quarter__` noma `__predicate_year__` esikhathini samanje.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-5: Ngokuzenzakalelayo amakhadi afakwe kungobo yomlando awaseshwa.

mongodb-compact-description: Ngemva kokuhambisa amafayela ukuwakhipha ku-MongoDB GridFS, ifayela le-database elikwidiski aliphandi ngokuzenzakalelayo. Ukusebenzisa i-Compact kubuyisa isikhala esikhululiwe ngokuphinda kubhalwe idatha yeqoqo. Yenza lokhu kuphela ngemva kokuba ukuhamba kwamafayela ngobuningi kuphelile.
mongodb-compact-warning: Isexwayiso: I-Compact ingumsebenzi ovimbayo ongathatha imizuzu embalwa kuma-database amakhulu. Kuma-replica set, wonke ama-secondary avuthelwa kuqala (ngokuzenzakalelayo), bese kulandela i-primary. Kuma-replica set enodi eyodwa asetshenziselwa i-oplog (isakhiwo esijwayelekile se-Meteor), i-primary kuphela evuthelwayo.

azure-connection-string-description: Ngokuzikhethela: sebenzisa i-string yoxhumano ephelele esikhundleni segama le-akhawunti nokhiye.
database-migration-description: Fudukisa idatha esekelwe kumbhalo (yonke into ngaphandle kokunamathiselwe nama-avatar, ahlala kwi-filesystem) phakathi kwe-MongoDB ne-FerretDB v1 (SQLite). Enye i-database kumele isebenze futhi ifinyeleleke (iziqhingi ezizenzakalelayo: FerretDB mongodb://127.0.0.1:27018, MongoDB mongodb://127.0.0.1:27019; guqula nge-WEKAN_FERRETDB_URL / WEKAN_MONGODB_URL). Ngemva kokuba kuqedile, khomba i-MONGO_URL kwenye i-database bese uqala kabusha i-WeKan (ku-Snap: snap set wekan database=ferretdb noma =mongodb).
database-migrate-to-ferretdb: Fudukisa idatha yombhalo iye ku-FerretDB v1 (SQLite)
database-migration-confirm: Kopisha wonke amaqoqo asekelwe kumbhalo aye ku-__db__? Okunamathiselwe nama-avatar akwi-filesystem akuthinteki. I-database okuyiwa kuyo kumele isebenze.
sandstorm-migration-description: Uma i-WeKan isebenza ngaphakathi kwe-Sandstorm grain, i-database yayo endala ye-MongoDB 3 ifudukiselwa ku-FerretDB v1 (SQLite) ekuqaleni kokuqala, futhi okunamathiselwe nama-avatar kuhanjiswa kusuka ku-database kuye kuma-directory e-files/attachments ne-files/avatars e-grain. Lokhu kubonisa ukuthi lokho kufuduka kuphumelele yini nokuthi ingakanani indawo yediski amafayela e-database ye-MongoDB endala amabisawasebenzisa ngaphakathi kwe-grain, futhi kukuvumela ukususa lawo mafayela angahluziwe ukukhulula isikhala.
sandstorm-delete-raw-mongodb-description: Ngemva kokufuduka okuphumelelayo idatha ihlala ku-FerretDB nakwi-filesystem, ngakho amafayela endala e-database ye-MongoDB 3 angahluziwe angasuswa ukukhulula isikhala sediski se-grain. Lokhu akunakuguqulwa.
sandstorm-delete-raw-mongodb-confirm: Susa amafayela e-database ye-MongoDB 3 angahluziwe ukukhulula isikhala sediski? Idatha isivele ifudukiselwe ku-FerretDB nakwi-filesystem. Lokhu akunakuguqulwa.
sandstorm-raw-mongodb-deleted: Amafayela e-database ye-MongoDB angahluziwe asusiwe, kukhululwe
cards-loading-description: Indlela ibhodi ngalinye elilayisha ngayo amakhadi alo. Wonke amakhadi: ikhadi ngalinye liyalayishwa kwisiphequluli (okulula kunazo zonke, zonke izici ziyasebenza, kodwa ibhodi elinamakhadi ayizinkulungwane lithumela idatha eningi kumbukeli ngamunye). Ivila: uhlu ngalunye lulayisha kuphela amakhadi abonakalayo manje (ukuskrola okungenamkhawulo) kanye nenani eliphilayo, ngakho amabhodi amakhulu kakhulu asebenzisa inkumbulo ne-bandwidth encane. Kusethwa nayi-CARDS_LOADING environment variable.
cards-loading-lazy-note: Ukulayisha kwekhadi ngevila kusengokuvivinya: izibali zekhadi nemikhawulo ye-WIP inembile, kodwa imibukiso ye-Calendar/Table/Gantt nokukhetha okuningi kukhombisa amakhadi alayishwe kuze kube manje kuphela. Layisha kabusha amabhodi avuliwe ngemva kokushintsha lokhu.
render-links-as-plain-text-description: Uma kunikwe amandla, wonke amalinki (kokubili amalinki e-markdown afana ne-[label](url) namathegi we-HTML ahlukile <a href>) ngaso sonke isikhathi abonakala njengombhalo omsulwa ongachofozeki kuzo zonke izinkambu zombhalo ocebile (izihloko zebhodi nekhadi, izincazelo, amazwana, izinhlu zokuhlola, njll.). Lokhu kuvimbela amalinki achofozekayo akhohlisayo. Okuzenzakalelayo kuvaliwe, ngakho amalinki ahlala echofozeka.
always-show-code-as-text: Ngaso sonke isikhathi bonisa wonke ikhodi njengombhalo omsulwa
always-show-code-as-text-description: Uma kunikwe amandla, umbhalo ocebile awulokothi ubonakaliswe njenge-markdown noma i-HTML: umthombo wonke ngaso sonke isikhathi ubonakaliswa njengombhalo omsulwa kuzo zonke izinkambu zombhalo ocebile (izihloko zebhodi nekhadi, izincazelo, amazwana, izinhlu zokuhlola, njll.). Lokhu kuveza okuqukethwe okufihliwe — amazwana e-HTML (<!-- -->), umgomo wamalinki e-markdown, i-JavaScript nanoma iyiphi enye ikhodi — ngakho yonke ikhodi ihlala ibonakala, ingachofozeki, futhi ingasebenzi. Okuzenzakalelayo kuvaliwe, ngakho i-markdown ibonakaliswa ngokuvamile.
disable-all-import-description: Uma kunikwe amandla, zonke izici zokungenisa zicishiwe: ukungenisa ibhodi kusuka ku-WeKan JSON, Trello, CSV/Excel, Jira, Kanboard, NextCloud Deck, OpenProject, GitHub, GitLab, Gitea ne-Forgejo, kanye nokuklona ibhodi. Izinketho zemenyu yokungenisa zifihliwe futhi iseva yenqaba noma isiphi isicelo sokungenisa. Okuzenzakalelayo kuvaliwe.
disable-all-export-description: Uma kunikwe amandla, zonke izici zokukhipha zicishiwe: ukukhipha ibhodi njenge-WeKan JSON, CSV, Excel, Kanboard, noma ku-NextCloud Deck / OpenProject / GitHub / GitLab / Gitea / Forgejo, nokukhipha okunamathiselwe okukodwa. Izinketho zemenyu yokukhipha zifihliwe futhi iseva yenqaba noma isiphi isicelo sokukhipha. Okuzenzakalelayo kuvaliwe.
disable-import-avatars-description: Uma kunikwe amandla, ama-avatar (izithombe zephrofayela zomsebenzisi) awalokothi angeniswe. Lokhu kufaka ukungenisa i-WeKan JSON, ukungenisa i-Trello, nokuvumelanisa i-avatar kubahlinzeki bomazisi bangaphandle lapho ungena (LDAP, OIDC/OAuth2). Amagama nenye idatha kusengeniswa; kuphela ama-avatar aweqiwa. Okuzenzakalelayo kuvaliwe.
disable-export-avatars-description: Uma kunikwe amandla, ama-avatar (izithombe zephrofayela zomsebenzisi) awalokothi afakwe lapho kukhishwa ibhodi (WeKan JSON ne-CSV export). Amagama abasebenzisi nenye idatha kusengakhishwa; kuphela ama-avatar ashiywa ngaphandle. Okuzenzakalelayo kuvaliwe.
anonymize-import-users-description: Uma kunikwe amandla, ukungenisa ibhodi le-WeKan JSON kuthatha indawo yegama lomsebenzisi ngamunye ongenisiwe, igama eliphelele nezinhlamvu zokuqala ngezibambi zezibalo (user1, user2, ...), kususe i-avatar yakhe, futhi ubhale kabusha @username okushiwo (kanye nezinkambu ze-requested-by / assigned-by) ngaphakathi kokuqukethwe kwekhadi nezwana elingenisiwe. Akukho ubunikazi bomsebenzisi bangempela obuvela ebhodini lomthombo obugcinwayo. Igama elithi "user" lilandela ulimi lomuntu ongenisayo. Okuzenzakalelayo kuvaliwe.
anonymize-export-users-description: Uma kunikwe amandla, ukukhipha ibhodi kuthatha indawo yegama lomsebenzisi ngamunye okhishiwe, igama eliphelele nezinhlamvu zokuqala ngezibambi zezibalo (user1, user2, ...), kususe i-avatar yakhe, futhi ubhale kabusha @username okushiwo (kanye nezinkambu ze-requested-by / assigned-by) ngaphakathi kokuqukethwe kwekhadi nezwana. Ifayela elikhishiwe alinabunikazi bomsebenzisi bangempela. Igama elithi "user" lilandela ulimi lomuntu okhiphayo. Okuzenzakalelayo kuvaliwe.
disable-activities-description: Uma kunikwe amandla, amarekhodi omfudlana wemisebenzi awalokothi arekhodwe futhi awalokothi aboniswe ndawana (ibha eseceleni yebhodi nethebhu yomsebenzi wekhadi). Akukho mlando wokuthi ngubani owenzeni ogcinwayo. Okuzenzakalelayo kuvaliwe.
disable-notifications-description: Uma kunikwe amandla, i-WeKan ayilokothi ithumele izaziso zokubuka (ku-app, i-imeyili noma ezinye izinsizakalo) kunoma iyiphi imisebenzi. Imisebenzi isengarekhodwa (ngaphandle uma kukhutshazwe nangenhla); kuphela izaziso ezicindezelwayo. Okuzenzakalelayo kuvaliwe.
disable-watch-description: Uma kunikwe amandla, isici sokubuka sicishiwe — abasebenzisi abakwazi ukubhalisela amabhodi, izinhlu noma amakhadi ukuthola izaziso, futhi noma yimuphi umzamo wokushintsha izinga lokubuka uyenqatshelwa. Okuzenzakalelayo kuvaliwe.
backup-description: Gcina i-backup Yokunamathiselwe, Ama-avatar kanye/noma Idatha (wonke amaqoqo asekelwe kumbhalo angewona okunamathiselwe noma ama-avatar). I-.zip isakazwa ngokuqondile kwisitoreji esikhethiwe — akukho fayela lesikhashana — njenge-backup/YYYY/MM/DD/HH_MM_SS/backup.zip, equkethe YYYY_MM_DD-HH_MM_SS/attachments, /avatars ne-/data. Izitoreji zeklaudi (S3/MinIO, Azure, GCS) zisebenzisa imininingwane yokugunyaza elungiswe kumathebhu azo esitoreji.
backup-restore-confirm: Buyisela i-backup ekhethiwe? Okunamathiselwe/ama-avatar kubhalwa kwi-filesystem futhi idatha ku-database ngokwemodi ekhethiwe.
gcs-key-filename-description: Ngokuzikhethela: indlela eya kufayela lokhiye we-akhawunti yesevisi le-JSON kwiseva.
gcs-credentials-description: Ngokuzikhethela: namathisela ukhiye we-akhawunti yesevisi le-JSON. Shiya kungenalutho ukusebenzisa ifayela lokhiye noma imininingwane ezenzakalelayo.
gcs-permissions-note: Nika i-akhawunti yesevisi ye-WeKan ukufinyelela kokufunda/kokubhala kwi-bucket: Google Cloud Console → Cloud Storage → Buckets → i-bucket yakho → Permissions → Grant access. Ku-"New principals", namathisela i-imeyili ye-akhawunti yesevisi — inani le-"client_email" kusuka kukhiye wakho we-JSON — bese ukhetha indima "Storage Object Admin" bese uLondoloza.
gcs-bucket-description: Igama le-bucket ye-Cloud Storage lokugcina amafayela.
s3-endpoint-menu-path: AWS: shiya kungenalutho (kusebenzisa i-endpoint yesifunda). Okuhambisana ne-S3: i-Endpoint URL kusuka kukhonsole yakho ye-MinIO / Cloudflare R2 / Backblaze B2 / Wasabi / DigitalOcean Spaces.
s3-region-menu-path: AWS Console → S3 → Buckets → i-bucket yakho → Properties → AWS Region.
s3-bucket-menu-path: AWS Console → S3 → Buckets → igama le-bucket yakho (noma Create bucket → Bucket name).
s3-access-key-menu-path: AWS Console → IAM → Users → umsebenzisi wakho → Security credentials → Access keys → Create access key → khetha isimo sokusebenzisa 'Application running outside AWS' → Create access key. Kuboniswa njenge-'Access key ID'.
s3-secret-key-menu-path: Isikrini esifanayo ne-Access key ID; i-'Secret access key' iboniswa kanye kuphela lapho ukhiye udalwa — kopisha ngaleso sikhathi (noma Download .csv).
azure-account-name-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → i-akhawunti yakho → igama eliboniswa phezulu (nangaphansi kwe-Security + networking → Access keys → Storage account name).
azure-account-key-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → i-akhawunti yakho → Security + networking → Access keys → key1 → Show → Key.
azure-connection-string-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → i-akhawunti yakho → Security + networking → Access keys → key1 → Connection string → Show.
azure-container-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → i-akhawunti yakho → Data storage → Containers → isiqukathi sakho (noma + Container ukudala esisodwa).
gcs-project-id-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → isikhetha-projekthi phezulu → i-ID yeprojekthi yakho (Cloud overview → Dashboard → Project info → Project ID).
gcs-bucket-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → Cloud Storage → Buckets → igama le-bucket yakho (noma Create ukwenza esisodwa).
gcs-key-filename-menu-path: Indlela kwiseva ye-WeKan eya kufayela lokhiye we-akhawunti yesevisi le-JSON elilandiwe (elidalwe ngezansi). Sebenzisa lokhu NOMA namathisela i-JSON kwinkambu engezansi.
gcs-credentials-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → IAM & Admin → Service accounts → i-akhawunti yakho yesevisi → Keys → Add key → Create new key → JSON → Create (kulanda ifayela). Namathisela okuqukethwe kwalo lapha, noma londoloza ifayela bese usetha indlela yalo ngenhla.
attachment-move-storage-azure: Hambisa okunamathiselwe kuye ku-Azure Blob Storage
attachment-move-storage-gcs: Hambisa okunamathiselwe kuye ku-Google Cloud Storage
gridfs-enabled-description: Sebenzisa i-MongoDB GridFS ukuze ugcine ifayela
migration-stop-confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukumisa konke ukufuduka?
gridfs-move-collectionfs-note: Ukwenza okunamathiselwe nama-avatar kubonakale, kuhambise kusuka ku-CollectionFS kuye kunoma isiphi esinye isitoreji.
s3-enabled-description: Sebenzisa i-AWS S3 noma i-MiniO ukuze ugcine ifayela
s3-endpoint-description: I-URL yephoyinti lokugcina le-S3 (isb., s3.amazonaws.com noma i-minio.example.com)
writable-path-description: Indlela eyisisekelo yohlu lwemibhalo yokugcina ifayela
comprehensive-board-migration-descriptio: Yenza ukuhlola okuphelele nokulungiswa kobuqotho bedatha yebhodi, okuhlanganisa ukuhleleka kohlu, ukuma kwamakhadi, nesakhiwo sokubhukuda.
delete-duplicate-empty-lists-migration-d: Isusa ngokuphephile izinhlu eziyimpinda ezingenalutho. Isusa kuphela izinhlu ezingenawo amakhadi FUTHI ibe nolunye uhlu olunesihloko esifanayo esiqukethe amakhadi.
restore-lost-cards-migration-description: Ithola futhi ibuyisele amakhadi nezinhlu ezine-swimlaneId engekho noma i-listId. Idala indlela yokubhukuda 'Yamakhadi Alahlekile' ukuze wenze zonke izinto ezilahlekile zibonakale futhi.
restore-all-archived-migration-descripti: Ibuyisela zonke izindawo zokubhukuda ezifakwe kungobo yomlando, izinhlu, namakhadi. Ilungisa ngokuzenzakalelayo noma iyiphi i-swimlaneId engekho noma i-listId ukuze wenze izinto zibonakale.
fix-missing-lists-migration-description: Ithola futhi ilungise uhlu olulahlekile noma olonakele esakhiweni sebhodi.
fix-avatar-urls-migration-description: Ibuyekeza ama-URL e-avatar ukuze amalungu ebhodi asebenzise i-backend yesitoreji efanele futhi alungise izithenjwa eziphukile ze-avatar.
fix-all-file-urls-migration-description: Ibuyekeza wonke ama-URL ananyathiselwe ifayela kuleli bhodi ukuze asebenzise isipele esilungile sesitoreji futhi alungise izithenjwa zefayela eziphukile.
migrations-admin-only: Abaphathi bebhodi kuphela abangasebenzisa ukuthuthela kwelinye izwe
migrations-description: Yenza ukuhlolwa kobuqotho bedatha nokulungiswa kwaleli bhodi. Ukuthutha ngakunye kungenziwa ngakunye.
run-comprehensive-migration-confirm: Lokhu kuzokwenza ukuthutha okuphelele ukuze kuhlolwe futhi kulungiswe ubuqotho bedatha yebhodi. Lokhu kungase kuthathe isikhashana. Qhubeka?
run-delete-duplicate-empty-lists-migrati: Lokhu kuzoqale kuguqule noma iluphi uhlu olwabiwe lube uhlu lokubhukuda ngakunye, bese kusula uhlu olungenalutho olunohlu oluyimpinda olunesihloko esifanayo esiqukethe amakhadi. Uhlu olungenalutho olungadingeki ngempela kuphela oluzosuswa. Qhubeka?
run-restore-lost-cards-migration-confirm: Lokhu kuzodala indlela yokubhukuda ethi 'Amakhadi Alahlekile' futhi kubuyisele wonke amakhadi nezinhlu ezine-swimlaneId engekho noma i-listId. Lokhu kuthinta kuphela izinto ezingagciniwe. Qhubeka?
run-restore-all-archived-migration-confi: Lokhu kuzobuyisela ZONKE izindawo zokubhukuda ezifakwe kungobo yomlando, izinhlu, namakhadi, kuzenze zibonakale futhi. Noma yiziphi izinto ezinomazisi abangekho zizolungiswa ngokuzenzakalelayo. Lokhu akukwazi ukuhlehliswa kalula. Qhubeka?
run-fix-missing-lists-migration-confirm: Lokhu kuzothola futhi kulungise izinhlu ezingekho noma ezonakele esakhiweni sebhodi. Qhubeka?
run-fix-avatar-urls-migration-confirm: Lokhu kuzobuyekeza ama-URL e-avatar ukuze amalungu ebhodi asebenzise i-backend yesitoreji efanele. Qhubeka?
run-fix-all-file-urls-migration-confirm: Lokhu kuzobuyekeza wonke ama-URL okunamathiselwe kwifayela kuleli bhodi ukuze kusetshenziswe isipele esilungile sesitoreji. Qhubeka?
restore-lost-cards-nothing-to-restore: Awekho ama-swimlanes alahlekile, izinhlu, noma amakhadi azobuyiselwa
migration-progress-note: Sicela ulinde ngenkathi sithuthela ibhodi lakho esakhiweni sakamuva...
conversion-info-text: Lokhu kuguqulwa kwenziwa kanye ebhodini ngalinye futhi kuthuthukisa ukusebenza. Ungaqhubeka nokusebenzisa ibhodi ngokujwayelekile.
converting-board-description: Ukuguqula isakhiwo sebhodi ukuze kusebenze okuthuthukisiwe. Lokhu kungase kuthathe isikhashana.
migration-batch-size-description: Inani lezinanyathiselwa okufanele zicutshungulwe eqeqebeni ngalinye (1-100)
migration-cpu-threshold-description: Misa isikhashana ukuthutha lapho ukusetshenziswa kwe-CPU kudlula leli phesenti (10-90)
migration-info-text: Ukuthutha kwesizindalwazi kwenziwa kanye futhi kuthuthukise ukusebenza kwesistimu. Inqubo iyaqhubeka ngemuva ngisho noma uvala isiphequluli sakho.
migration-resume-failed: Yehlulekile ukuqalisa kabusha ukuthuthela kwelinye izwe
migration-warning-text: Sicela ungasivali isiphequluli sakho ngesikhathi sokuthutha. Inqubo izoqhubeka ngemuva kodwa ingase ithathe isikhathi eside ukuqeda.
account-locked: I-akhawunti ikhiyiwe okwesikhashana ngenxa yemizamo eminingi ehlulekile yokungena ngemvume. Sicela uzame futhi emuva kwesikhathi.
username-too-short: Igama lomsebenzisi kufanele okungenani libe nezinhlamvu ezi-3
problems-summary-help: Maka izindawo ezinezinkinga osuzibuyekezile, bese uchofoza uYamukela ukuze usethe kabusha inani lazo lezinkinga ezintsha.
